subject: Fraud Prevention - Suspicious Transaction Alert
body:
Compliance and Finance Teams,

Our transaction monitoring system flagged the following for review:

Alert #2026-0342:
- Type: Unusual vendor payment pattern
- Vendor: TechSupply Partners LLC
- Issue: 5 invoices submitted in 3 days totaling $48K, all just under $10K approval threshold
- Pattern: Classic invoice splitting behavior
- Risk Level: Medium

Alert #2026-0343:
- Type: New vendor with high initial payment
- Vendor: Innovation Consulting Group
- Issue: New vendor added March 10, $35K invoice submitted March 12
- Pattern: Vendor was added by the same person who approved the invoice
- Risk Level: High (segregation of duties violation)

Immediate Actions Taken:
- Both payments have been held pending investigation
- Vendor verification calls initiated
- AP team notified to not process additional invoices from these vendors

Please complete the investigation within 5 business days per our anti-fraud policy. If confirmed, escalate to the Audit Committee per Section 4.2 of our Fraud Response Plan.

All documentation should be retained in the secure compliance folder.
